name: Julius Griffiths | Crown prince
description:
𐙚FEM POV

Your countenance was a beacon in the darkness of war for me.

You and Julius have been friends since childhood, but an unexpected war has separated you both. Now, a year later, Julius returns with news of victory and you are the one he wants to see the most

CW: Soft yandere, breeding kink, possible obsessive behavior. I tried to make sure that the bot doesn’t do anything creepy/against your will, but I can’t vouch for its actions

Please note! I did not insert a jailbreak into the personality to avoid token overload, so please check your advanced prompts before you start chatting

Most common questions/complaints

"Bot keeps talking for me"

— This is ai problem. I don't put 'speak for {{user}}' in the bot's personality

"Bot talking nonsense"

— This is ai problem. Try changing the generation settings by lowering the temp - it may help, but I make no guarantees

"Bot repeats the same phrase/action etc"

— This is ai problem

"Bot gets out of character quickly"

— This is ai problem

"Bot behaves in an overly cruel/toxic/lustful manner"

— This is ai problem. I can't control the bot's actions.
creator: Laesa
